summary: PHASE 29.4 Hypothesis Registry testing completed successfully. All new registry endpoints are working correctly with comprehensive statistics, cross-symbol monitoring, and MongoDB persistence with extended fields.
passed_tests: GET /api/v1/hypothesis/stats/{symbol} - comprehensive statistics with directional, type, conflict, and execution breakdowns
GET /api/v1/hypothesis/recent - recent hypotheses across all symbols with proper sorting
GET /api/v1/hypothesis/symbols - list of tracked symbols functionality
GET /api/v1/hypothesis/current/{symbol} - stores hypothesis with all extended fields
GET /api/v1/hypothesis/history/{symbol} - extended history with structural_score, execution_score, conflict_score, conflict_state
POST /api/v1/hypothesis/recompute/{symbol} - stores and returns hypothesis with all PHASE 29.2/29.3 scores
MongoDB persistence with all extended PHASE 29.2/29.3/29.4 fields
Statistics averages calculation for confidence, reliability, structural_score, execution_score, conflict_score
Cross-symbol statistics working correctly for multiple symbols
Recent hypotheses properly sorted by creation time (newest first)
Price tracking feature (price_at_creation) included in hypothesis storage for future outcome analysis
All scoring components in valid 0-1 ranges across all endpoints
Recent bias trend calculation (BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL based on last 10 hypotheses)
success_percentage: backend: 100% (10/10 PHASE 29.4 tests passed), frontend: N/A (backend only testing)
